expected_signals.summary: SynthID was used to debunk a widely shared fake image showing Mitch McConnell in severe distress in a hospital bed.
expected_signals.anchor_quote: used to debunk a high-profile AI-generated hoax image

expected_signals.summary: The article presents this as a notable success for watermark-based anti-deepfake detection.
expected_signals.anchor_quote: a rare but significant win for the system

expected_signals.summary: SynthID is limited because it only works when image generators opt into the watermarking program.
expected_signals.anchor_quote: can only be used when an image-generation tool actively participates in the program

notes: No runnable verifier: this is a static-document extraction task. Observable proof is that each anchor_quote is an exact substring from the provided text. The document says the McConnell image was fake; it does not establish new facts about his actual health.
